name: The Very Trevor Ashley Show
overview: A modern comedy about a Filipino cleaner, a Muslim taxi driver and a very white self-absorbed performer. They are thrown together to make a multi-cultural variety show, except they have no money, no guests and no idea. But that won’t stop them putting on a good show.  Cabaret performer and drag artist Trevor Ashley presents a variety show with a difference. A nationally renowned theatre and musical performer, Trevor transforms into the world's legendary divas with a cavalcade of hit songs.

trailers.title: THE VERY TREVOR ASHLEY SHOW on SBS2 Wed 22nd May at 11.25pm & on demand
